name: Heather Larrison
subject: Hillary is hoping you won’t read this email
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Right to Rise PAC, Inc
body:
Friend,

I needed to make sure you saw Governor Bush's note below. Since Hillary announced we've had thousands of people step up.

The bad news is, we're still 1,753 supporters short of our goal.

[**Now, I need you to step up and contribute $5 to send a message to Hillary that we 're not going to let her waltz on into the White House.**](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=1746:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)

**A group of supporters saw the Governor 's email and understand the importance of Republicans defeating Hillary in 2016 so they have decided to match every donation until midnight tonight!**

[](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=1747:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)

[**The stakes are high Friend, but I know I can count on you to contribute $5 now and join the fight.**](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=1748:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)

Heather Larrison
Finance Director

**-- Begin Forwarded Message--
From: Jeb Bush
Date: April 12, 2015
Subject: Hillary Announcement:**

Friend,

Moments ago Hillary Clinton officially announced her White House bid - and it's up to us to stop her.

I'm going to be straightforward with you, this isn't going to be easy. **Hillary plans to raise $1.7 billion to win the White House and she already has 135,000 donors at the ready.**

[**But I wouldn 't be asking if I didn't know you were up for it, which is why I'm asking you to give $5 right now to stop her.**](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=1749:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)

Every dollar you give goes directly to fighting her Liberal agenda and ensuring we don't suffer another 4 years of Democrat control.

[](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=1750:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)

8 years of Democrat control has already done untold damage, 4 more years of Clinton control will only make it worse.

[**To do this, we 'll need you to step up like never before, and right now I need you to give $5 to show you're ready to defeat Hillary in 2016.**](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=1751:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)

This is going to be a long fight, but together, we will stop her.

Thank you for your help, you'll be hearing from me again soon.

Jeb

[](http://click1.mail.righttorisepac.org/t.do?id=1752:55890:DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE)
[ ](https://www.facebook.com/jebbush) [ ](https://twitter.com/jebbush)
Paid for by Right to Rise PAC, Inc. Not Authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.[www.RighttoRisePac.org](www.RighttoRisePac.org)
Right to Rise PO Box 14349 Tallahassee, FL 32317
[Unsubscribe](http://www.mail.righttorisepac.org/Unsub.do?a=u&e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mid=167&sid=DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&rid=55890&lid=1)

name: Marco Rubio
subject: I'm Running for President
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41557626:16538399063:m:1:1349778030:9AE8E9B275A94028587D03FF0CE440CD:r)
---
#
Dear Peter, A short while ago, here in Miami at the Freedom Tower, I officially announced my candidacy for President of the United States of America! I'm running for the highest office in our land because I want to fight for the New American Century, where our best days are still in the future. Now, I need your help on day one. For the next 24 hours ONLY, when you donate to our new campaign, you'll receive a special gift in appreciation for becoming a [Day One Supporter.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41557627:16538399063:m:1:1349778030:9AE8E9B275A94028587D03FF0CE440CD:r) _**[It would mean so much to me if I could include you as one of our Day One Supporters. Even if you're only able to give $5 to our effort today, it will go a long way toward launching our campaign with momentum.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41557628:16538399063:m:1:1349778030:9AE8E9B275A94028587D03FF0CE440CD:r)**_ Starting our campaign off on the right foot is absolutely critical! Thanks for your support! Sincerely, Marco Rubio
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41557629:16538399063:m:1:1349778030:9AE8E9B275A94028587D03FF0CE440CD:r)
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41557630:16538399063:m:1:1349778030:9AE8E9B275A94028587D03FF0CE440CD:r)
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/41557631:16538399063:m:1:1349778030:9AE8E9B275A94028587D03FF0CE440CD:r)
| Paid for by Marco Rubio for President |

name: Josh Wolf, MurphyForFlorida.com
subject: Rubio OUT
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| Marco Rubio is out, and we're so thankful that he's taking his anti-marriage equality, Social Security and Medicare-cutting agenda with him.Hey --

It's official:

Senator Marco Rubio just announced he's running for President. That means he won't be running against Patrick Murphy for United States Senate in 2016!

Frankly, it couldn't come a moment sooner. People in Florida are ready for a leader they can count on in the Senate.

**So here 's the plan: We're getting everyone who's ready for change in Florida and across the country to raise their... water bottles... in a toast, and say "Farewell Marco Rubio!"** [](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2724/738133e4/398bf958/7f9b9347/3933545616/VEsH/ "http://www.murphyforflorida.com/farewell-rubio?sc=ema_2015-04-12_b1_jw_v1") **[Click here to sign our farewell card to Marco Rubio, and don't forget to leave a note as your own personal "toast" >>](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2724/738133e4/398bf958/7f9b9347/3933545616/VEsE/ "http://www.murphyforflorida.com/farewell-rubio?sc=ema_2015-04-12_b1_jw_v1")**

Marco Rubio is out, and we're so thankful that he's taking his anti-marriage equality, Social Security and Medicare-cutting agenda with him.

If you are too, sign the card:

**[murphyforflorida.com/farewell-rubio](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2724/738133e4/398bf958/7f9b9347/3933545616/VEsF/ "http://www.murphyforflorida.com/farewell-rubio?sc=ema_2015-04-12_b1_jw_v1")**

Thanks,

Josh Wolf

Campaign Manager
Murphy For Florida | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://act.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae2724/738133e4/398bf958/7f9b9340/3933545616/VEsC/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")

name: Hillary Clinton
subject: Why I'm running
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
body:
I'm going to work to earn every vote. | [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MjI0NzU0MTMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTQxMzU5NjYwS0&mt=1&rt=0) Friend -- I was raised with the belief that living in this country was one of the greatest blessings anyone could have. Today, for so many families, the path to lasting prosperity is unclear. Families have fought their way back from tough economic times. But it's not enough -- not when the average CEO makes about 300 times what the average worker makes. **Everyday Americans need a champion, and I want to be that champion.** I've spent my entire life standing up for women, children, families, and anyone who needed a little help along the way. That's what this campaign will be about, and that's what I'll do every single day as your president. It's time for us to fight for people like my dad, who ran a small business and committed himself to building a better life for his family. People like my mom, who relied on the kindness of others to get through a tough childhood -- and like my baby granddaughter, who deserves to grow up in a country where every single kid has the opportunity to live up to her or his potential. This won't be easy. And I won't take anything for granted. I'm going to work my heart out to earn every single vote, because I know it's your time. **I want you with me on this. Chip in what you can today to help build our campaign:** **[https://www.hillaryclinton.com/donate](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=5&ms=MjI0NzU0MTMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTQxMzU5NjYwS0&mt=1&rt=0)** Thanks, Hillary

| | PAID FOR BY HILLARY FOR AMERICA
---
Contributions or gifts to Hillary for America are not tax deductible.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [Click here to unsubscribe](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=1&ms=MjI0NzU0MTMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTQxMzU5NjYwS0&mt=1&rt=0).
Hillary for America, PO Box 5256, New York, NY 10185
[Privacy Policy](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MjI0NzU0MTMS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=NTQxMzU5NjYwS0&mt=1&rt=0)
